case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. MERCEDES M TAYLOR

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO 395(B): VENUE OF PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 72291297) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
